Read:

- .github/copilot-instructions.md


Read:

- .github/progress.md

Generate the first unchecked mission.

After generation:

- when generated, update progress.md 
(ex: `- [x] 01-projects-and-namespaces`).




Create a new folder:

labs/<topic-name>/

Generate:

- mission.md
- lab.md
- investigation.md
- solution.md
- notes.md
- submission.md
- diagram.md

Requirements:

- CRC compatible
- Increase difficulty gradually
- Include troubleshooting scenarios
- Focus on understanding OpenShift internals
- Explain Kubernetes resources involved
- Do not regenerate completed missions
- Follow all repository instructions
